emails.subject: RE: Enpower positions
emails.body: RE: Enpower positions I was incorrect about Alberta ENA, it should be zero but where is Alberta? It should have a big position. Stacey To: White, Stacey W.

emails.subject: RE: Enpower positions
emails.body: Stacey, ALBERTADIR is in the table: Peak (20,162), Off-peak (20,588) Per your last email, I'll remove RETAILEAST and RETAILWEST. For spreadsheets, we currently see the following: POWER-SS-R3B-PRC POWER-SS-R3C-PRC POWER-SS-R1B-PRC We'll take these from RiskTrac. For SouthAmerica positions, we can also take from RiskTrac The numbers for EAST and WEST are off because I ran the query at around 11AM. I didn't realize that Adhoc only holds the last calculated numbers, not as of a certain effective date. If we run the query everyday at 7AM, can we be sure we're capturing all of previous day's trading? And none of current day's? Thanks. -Tom To: Victorio, Tom
